steps.title: Use the waking image
steps.content: The passage compares Mole to someone wakened suddenly from a beautiful dream. In that context, suddenly describes an immediate, jarring shift rather than something gradual or chosen.

steps.title: Choose the abrupt meaning
steps.content: The matching word means abruptly. Choice B means many times, Choice C means by choice, and Choice D means gently or lovingly; none fits the sudden waking image. The answer is A.
